description.ko: 유기적 꽃잎의 질감과 광섬유 회로가 조화를 이룬 디지털 꽃.
description.en: A digital flower blending organic petal textures with fiber-optic circuitry.

prompt: A hyper-realistic cinematic 3D render of FLORA-9, titled 'The Binary Blossom.' A futuristic botanical form featuring translucent #FFB6C1 pink petals woven with #50C878 emerald micro-circuitry and #89CFF0 cyan fiber-optic veins. Rooted in a bed of #4A0E4E deep plum data-soil. Shimmering digital pollen floats like glowing pixels. Unreal Engine 5 style, macro focus, bioluminescent glow, 8k resolution.
